description: Classic tapering monk-strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. Mild brogue detailing on the toe box on this slim silhouetted shoe gives a fun, casual vibe to this formal shoe. Wear this with tonal, structured trousers and a crisp shirt and a leather jacket. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel and brogue detailing on the toe box Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability A strap with cut-out pattern across the midfoot and forefoot for a customised Fit Leather lining Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot, as a part of the strap buckle Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel Textured, mettalic toned grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
